name: Mira
text: Sister, Sunrise took every card in our final act and still made her own ending.

name: Aisha
text: And your rigged table could not hide it, Mira. Her desire became honest.

name: Selkie
text: I do not need purity. I need Moon to know I chose to return.

name: Mira
text: Then quit explaining it to us. My sister and I have heard enough; tell the woman herself.

name: Aisha
text: Mira is right. Caelia guards the last orbit; Sunset waits beyond the violet gate.

name: Selkie
text: Moon, this time Sunrise is not leaving. I am coming back for you.
